sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n87853" key="pro/kranos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πρόκρᾱνος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n87853.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">προκέφαλος</ref> </xr> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope></bibl>, Anatol. in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8(3).188</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
